not_available_note: The PA DOR website (revenue.pa.gov) serves HTML portal pages instead of PDFs for all PA-40 URLs tested, including 2025_pa-40.pdf, pa-40.pdf, and 2025_PA-40.pdf. The site requires JavaScript/portal navigation to access the actual PDF. HTTP 200 is returned but content-type is text/html. PA pushes taxpayers to its myPATH portal (https://mypath.pa.gov/) for electronic filing. Other PA forms (e.g., REV-276) do serve directly as PDF. Verified 2026-04-12.
